global.description: The ad features a prominent card design with a clear call to action and pricing information.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save with confidence on a service.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Card design
elements.description: A rectangular card design with rounded edges, featuring various shapes inside.

elements.label: Oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape in the center of the card, colored in a lighter shade of purple.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned within the card, also in a lighter purple tone.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Three small circles aligned horizontally at the bottom of the card.

elements.label: Card design variant
elements.description: A variant of the card design, featuring a different arrangement of shapes.

elements.label: Vertical rectangle
elements.description: A vertical rectangle shape positioned within the card, contrasting with the other elements.

elements.label: Small oval shape
elements.description: A smaller oval shape located near the top of the card.

elements.label: Vertical rectangle variant
elements.description: Another vertical rectangle shape, slightly different in size and position.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A bold price tag displayed prominently in the ad, indicating the cost.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text providing additional information about the offer, positioned near the price.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: Another line of text that complements the main message of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text that captures the viewer's attention, prominently displayed.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence $4.99st ard Watch now

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo of the advertiser, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern flat design, card design, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline, body text, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, $4.99, Watch now, SwiftStack
